Describe the specific actions involving the telescope and the characters during the first half of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, an elderly male character with a white beard looks into the eyepiece of a large telescope; at 2s, a small black cat-like character stands nearby holding a dark object; at 6s, the man leans forward to place his eye against the telescope eyepiece again while the cat observes.

question: Describe the sequence of interactions between the man and the safe object in the second half of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 12s, a large boxy safe with the word SAFE printed on top appears within a circular vignette; at 14s, the bald man with a mustache extends his right hand towards the safe combination dial; at 16s, the man opens the safe door and bends over with his upper body inside the box.
